title: NELFUND CLARIFIES STUDENTS UPKEEP ALLOWANCE
summary: The Nigeria Education Loan Fund (NELFUND) has clarified that the approved monthly upkeep allowance for students remains ₦20,000, debunking claims of an increase to ₦25,000 or ₦50,000. Students are advised to ignore misinformation and rely only on official updates from NELFUND.
fullContent:
The Nigeria Education Loan Fund (NELFUND) has addressed recent misinformation circulating among students regarding the monthly upkeep allowance provided under its scheme.

In an official clarification, the Fund stated that the approved monthly upkeep allowance remains ₦20,000, contrary to widespread reports suggesting an increase to ₦25,000 or ₦50,000.

NELFUND urged students and the general public to disregard such misleading claims, emphasizing that no changes have been made to the current allowance structure.

Students are further advised to rely only on verified information from official NELFUND channels and trusted sources to avoid confusion and stay properly informed.
